# Code Anchors: Same-Origin Shell Guard

- `apps/prime/server/pty-origin-guard.ts` — the host-derived origin check (absent origin allowed, malformed refused).
- `apps/prime/server/pty-bridge.ts` — enforcement point: runs the check before completing the handshake, ahead of any spawn.
- `apps/prime/server/pty-origin-guard.spec.ts` — guard behavior verification.
